title: U.S. Intelligence Shows China Taking a More Active Role in Iran War
summary: China may have shipped missiles to Iran, and Beijing is allowing some companies to sell Tehran supplies that can be used in military production, American officials said.

title: Iran Unable to Find Mines It Planted in Strait of Hormuz, U.S. Says
summary: The lost mines have prevented Iran from quickly complying with President Trump’s demand to allow more ships to pass through the waterway.

summary: Vice President JD Vance is leading the U.S. delegation, which is in Pakistan for negotiations with Iranian officials.

title: Another Giant Leap Reminds Us How Small We Are
summary: A mission that took four astronauts farther than any human has ever traveled in the history of mankind has made people feel a little trippy.

summary: The astronauts — three Americans and one Canadian — captivated the world with their historic mission.

title: How to Be Mayor in 100 Days: Mamdani Grapples With a Learning Curve
summary: Zohran Mamdani has accrued a long list of quick accomplishments as mayor of New York City, but he has also abandoned some key campaign promises.

summary: The mayor has embraced the decades-old concept of “sewer socialism,” hoping to improve New Yorkers’ lives by focusing on public services.

title: As Election Looms, Will Alito Retire, Giving Trump a New Supreme Court Pick?
summary: Justice Samuel A. Alito Jr. is the subject of intense speculation about whether he will retire in the coming months and give President Trump a fourth nominee.

title: Pentagon Asks Court to Keep Its Restrictions on Journalists
summary: The Defense Department wants to keep in place a policy requiring escorts for journalists in the building while it appeals a court decision that tossed out broader restrictions on the media.

title: Trump Says First Lady ‘Had a Right’ to Talk About Epstein
summary: President Trump said in an interview that he had known his wife wanted to address rumors about the late sex offender at some point, but that he had not known exactly what she would say.

title: Growing List of Orban Loyalists Defecting Before Critical Election
summary: With Prime Minister Viktor Orban seeming vulnerable before Sunday’s vote, criticism is growing from within institutions his party once counted on for support.

summary: America may be losing more than just the conflict in Iran.

title: He Was ‘Trump Before Trump.’ Now He’s in Trouble.

title: Monthly Report
summary: What can we learn from April, a month of contradictions that never cleanly resolve themselves?

title: Officer Fatally Shoots Attacker at Grand Central After 3 Are Stabbed With Machete
summary: The stabbing victims, two men and a woman, were expected to survive after the attacks on two subway platforms, officials said.

title: Eric Swalwell Faces Sex Assault Accusation as He Runs for California Governor
summary: Eric Swalwell, a Democratic congressman, denied the accounts published by CNN and The San Francisco Chronicle. Nancy Pelosi was among those who said he should withdraw from the California governor’s race.

title: These Towns Want a Tsunami Shelter Before It’s Too Late
summary: Many coastal towns along the West Coast can’t afford to build lifesaving structures in the event of surging waves, putting homes and residents in jeopardy.

title: Eight Arrested in Connection With Deadly California Fireworks Explosion
summary: The explosion last July in Esparto, Calif., killed seven people. Five of the eight arrested, including a former local police officer, have been charged with murder.
